ocr_findings.description: Top of OCR text begins mid-sentence ('の文書はプロジェクトの創始者やスポンサーが作成します。') — the preceding text about プロジェクト憲章 definition is cut off. The image confirms the page begins mid-paragraph, so this is a page boundary artifact, not an OCR error within this page.
In the 10-row PMBOKの10の知識エリア table, 'プロジェクト品質マネジメント' cell description mentions 'テストカバー率' — OCR renders this correctly in bold. All 10 rows are present and correctly structured.

reviewer_notes: Content page (cleaned version used) covering PMBOKの10の知識エリア. The 10-row table with 知識エリア and 説明 columns is fully and correctly reproduced including all knowledge area names and descriptions. The 表記に注意 sidebar note is faithfully captured. The partial sentence at top is a page-boundary issue, not an OCR error.
